Localization.Description: A connection is allowed or denied by a rule

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A connection from host {src.host}:{src.port} to host {dst.host}:{dst.port} is denied by the rule "{subject.name}" on host {event_src.host}
A connection from host {src.host}:{src.port} to host {dst.host}:{dst.port} is allowed by the rule "{subject.name}" on host {event_src.host}
